mongoMissing: MONGODB_URI is not configured. Set it in .env before running `audithex user`.
invalidEmail: Please provide a valid email address.
passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters long.

create.summary: Create the single local web-UI user (interactive password)
create.exists: A user with email {{email}} already exists. Re-run with --force to rotate the password.

flags.email: Skip the email prompt and use this address
flags.password: Skip the password prompt and use this value (avoid in shared shells)
flags.force: Overwrite the password when a user with this email already exists

prompts.email: Email for the local web-UI user
prompts.password: Password for the local web-UI user (>=8 characters)
